回上一頁	國立金門大學	 
 	教學綱要	 

部別 : 日間部學士班	114學年度第1學期	列印日期 : 2026/05/24
科目名稱 : 英語課室管理 (English Classroom Management)	開課班級 : 應英三年級	學　　分 : 2.0	授課時數 : 2.0
授課教師 : 羅主恩	必選修 : 選修	 	 


1.教學目標
In this course, you will learn essential principles and methods of classroom motivation, planning and management to prepare you to develop a more effective classroom. You will gain understanding of how to create a learning environment where everyone feels safe, accepted and respected, and learning opportunities are equal. Good classroom management techniques can ensure better and more effective learning outcomes.  


2.教學綱要
1. Gain classroom-management knowledge (terminology, classifications, methods, trends)
2. Learn to apply important principles into your own classes (to improve thinking, problem solving, and decisions)
3. Develop specific classroom management skills, competencies, and points of view needed in the English teaching field.
 


3.教科書
1	書名 : Comprehensive Classroom Management　
出版日期 : 年 月 
作者 : Vern & Louise Jones　出版社 : Longman.　版本 :  


無參考書資料。

※請遵守智慧財產權觀念，依著作權法規定，教科書及教材不得非法影印與使用盜版軟體。

6.成績評定及課堂要求
100 % presentation  
Attendance: 2 class absences are permitted without penalty but all assignments are required. Make sure you contact another student for notes, assignments, or hand-outs prior to the next class. Being 10-minutes late for class is regarded as an absence. Late Assignments: All assignments are due on the dates announced. Assignments turned in after the due dates will NOT be accepted.
